title: Assembling the Grounded Prompt
concept: Compiling the top-3 reranked chunks into the context section of the instruction prompt.

exercises.prompt: What is the purpose of using a cross-encoder in our previous lesson?

options.text: To rescore the relevance of candidates
To generate new text from scratch

exercises.explain: The cross-encoder helps us determine which candidates are the most relevant by giving them a fresh score.

cards.title: What is a Grounded Prompt?
cards.body: A grounded prompt includes specific information retrieved from reliable sources. It helps the model answer questions based on actual content.

cards.title: Defining Context Section
cards.body: The context section of a prompt contains the information needed to answer a question accurately. It should be based on the best retrieved content.

cards.title: Assembling Clues Like a Detective
cards.body: Imagine you’re a detective piecing together clues. Each chunk of information is a clue that helps solve the mystery. The more relevant clues you have, the better your chances of solving it!

cards.title: Example of a Grounded Prompt
cards.body: If the question is about climate change, the context might include the top-3 relevant studies or articles that explain its effects on the environment.

cards.title: Myth: Any Information Works
cards.body: It's a myth that any chunk of text will do. Only the top-relevant chunks improve answer quality.

cards.title: Visualizing Prompt Assembly
cards.body: When creating a grounded prompt, gather your top-3 reranked chunks. Place them in the context area of your prompt.

exercises.prompt: Why is it important to include the top-3 reranked chunks in the grounded prompt?
exercises.explain: Including the top-3 reranked chunks improves accuracy because they contain the most relevant information.

exercises.prompt: True or False: The more chunks you add to a grounded prompt, the better it performs.
exercises.explain: Adding too many chunks can overwhelm the model; it works best with the most relevant information.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: The context section helps to provide _____ for the model to improve its answers.
exercises.sentence: The context section helps to provide relevant information for the model to improve its answers.
exercises.explain: The context must contain relevant information, as this is what helps generate accurate answers.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following best describes what to include in the context section of a grounded prompt?

options.text: All available information to clutter the prompt
The top-3 reranked chunks to ensure relevance
Just one irrelevant source to confuse the model

exercises.explain: The context section should focus on the top-3 reranked chunks to ensure that the model has the best information to work with.

exercises.prompt: Why do we prioritize the top-3 reranked chunks in assembling the grounded prompt?

options.text: They are the longest chunks available
They contain the highest relevance for the question
They include all types of information

exercises.explain: Prioritizing the top-3 reranked chunks ensures we provide the model with the most relevant information, leading to better and more accurate answers.
